info.title: Ethiopian Patient Gender values Schema API
info.description: JSON Schema for Ethiopian Patient Gender values ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-gender-vs
get.description: This endpoint serves the JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-gender-vs.

ValueSet-gender-vs.title: Ethiopian Patient Gender values Schema
ValueSet-gender-vs.description: JSON Schema for Ethiopian Patient Gender values ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.
ValueSet-gender-vs.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the Ethiopian Patient Gender values ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://fhir.et/core/ValueSet-gender-vs.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
